data.name: I made a FEMBOY SQUIRT!
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy, Female on Femboy

A friend you've played online games with for a long time slides into your DMs. As it turns out, he lives in the same city as you...and is cute AF. The two of you decide to meet up to "help" each other out.

However, the path towards getting him "over the fence" is fraught with detours.

Moral of the story: Don't be a selfish lover! 💦

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay
  • Choices matter
  • H-Scenes
  • ~7K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

data.short_description: An old friend asks a big favor...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
